_note: Human yes/no decisions on the ❌ wiki characters (the 'NEEDS decision' list in character_report_block01.md). 'yes' -> source a portrait and add an entry to character_map.json. 'no' -> do NOT source art; the character keeps appearing in scenes but is intentionally portrait-less. Once wired into build_character_report.py, 'no' characters drop out of the ❌ 'NEEDS decision' bucket so they aren't re-asked.
